channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: African devs: build a portfolio that hires you
item.description: Build a portfolio that lands remote jobs from Africa in 2026 — stop grinding LeetCode and start shipping impact. Includes real systems, debugging artifacts, and the 3 concrete numbers you need.

item.title: Choose the right real-time protocol
item.description: Compare WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling in 2026 with real latency, CPU and cost data from Node 20 LTS and Redis 7.2 benchmarks under 100 clients.

item.title: Land remote pay with US rates in 2026
item.description: Land a $110k remote salary from a lower-cost country in 2026 — exact negotiation brief, FX hedging script, and cost-to-company table used to close 14 deals since 2023.

item.title: Production RAG pipelines: the hidden bottlenecks
item.description: How we cut RAG pipeline latency 80% in prod — vector store choice, caching, and the plumbing mistakes most tutorials skip. Costs, benchmarks, and code included.

item.title: Pool size wrong? Your DB spills
item.description: Cut database connection pool latency 50% by ditching the 5× CPU cores myth — real benchmarks, memory math, and the timeout that breaks everything

item.title: Is $100/month AI worth indie devs?
item.description: Cut AI coding budget waste with a $100/month cap — real token costs, guardrails, and when AI saves time vs when it burns cash in 2026.

item.title: Compare WebSockets, SSE & polling
item.description: WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling in 2026: latency, memory, and cost numbers you can trust. Pick the right push tech for your next feature.

item.title: AI skills that pay: prompt eng vs finetuning salaries
item.description: Fine-tuning salaries are $165k vs $125k for prompt engineering in 2026. See the data, tools, and ROI that separate the two paths.

item.title: Land remote job offers 30% higher with this script
item.description: Land remote jobs 30% higher with a simple spreadsheet and email templates — FX buffers, market uplift, and scripts that work in 2026

item.title: Fix RAG latency before you scale
item.description: Cut RAG latency 80% and AWS bill 39% by collapsing retrieval into the API process. Learn the exact steps most tutorials skip: in-memory indexes, gRPC over Unix sockets, quantised embeddings, and bloom filters.

item.title: 7 ways to break your DB pool limit
item.description: Set max pool size too low? Your app is burning cash — latency spikes, throughput drops, and cloud bills rise when you follow the ‘CPU × 2’ rule. Benchmark your pool size in 30 minutes.

item.title: Remote jobs: stop polishing, start shipping
item.description: Stop polishing your resume — build a $12/month system that proves you can ship production code. 3 real portfolios that landed remote jobs from Nairobi in 2026.

item.title: Laptop LLM: waste of time or real tool?
item.description: Run a 7B LLM on a 16GB laptop with <1s token latency — memory budget, thermal limits, and wrapper code that actually works in 2026.

item.title: Rethink DB Pool Size: Memory, Not Cores
item.description: Cut API latency 60% by fixing connection pool sizing — stop setting max pool size to CPU cores and follow this 2026-tested formula instead.

item.title: Portfolio mistake most devs make
item.description: Portfolio mistake most devs make: 80 hours spent on five projects gets ignored while one system with production artifacts lands remote offers — here’s the data from 200+ interviews with Nairobi engineers in 2026

item.title: Choose WebSocket, SSE, or Polling Wisely
item.description: Compare WebSockets vs SSE vs long polling in 2026 with concrete latency, cost, and memory numbers — pick the right push tech in 30 minutes.

item.title: Load-testing RAG: 10k RPM lessons
item.description: It worked fine for 100 users, but when we ran the first load test with Locust—just 10k requests in 5 minutes—we saw 8-second p95 latency and 40% 5xx…

item.title: Reverse-engineer remote budgets in 3 emails
item.description: Learn the 3-email sequence that closed remote salaries 8–33% higher in 2026 — with a free Google Sheets model, fee calculator, and actual payout data from clients in the US, EU, and Latin America.

item.title: Data skills that pay 28% more in 2026
item.description: TensorFlow + TFX roles pay 28% more than PyTorch-only roles in 2026, but PyTorch + TorchServe cuts inference latency in half. Signal which stack to learn first.

item.title: Avoid multi-tenant SQL traps: pick the wrong schema
item.description: Cut multi-tenant SaaS database costs 50% with schema versioning — real migrations, blast radius, and infra numbers from 2026 systems.
